message:
feat(memo): expose stable quarantine inspection items for operator tooling

Add `MemoQuarantineInspectionItem` and a matching
`ContentAddressedMemoCache::quarantine_inspection_items()` method that
returns a deterministically sorted snapshot of every quarantined entry
alongside the reason string that caused quarantine. This gives operator
tooling a stable, serializable view over memo quarantine state without
exposing the raw internal `HashMap<MemoKey, String>`.

Ordering is lexicographic on (algorithm, algorithm_version, content_hash,
reason) so downstream tests and CLI output are reproducible across runs
regardless of HashMap iteration order.

Also adds a unit test (`quarantine_inspection_items_are_stable_and_reasoned`)
that exercises:
  - cross-algorithm ordering (lexical-normalize before semantic-embed)
  - intra-algorithm ordering by content hash (lex-a before lex-b)
  - reason strings flow through unchanged
  - serde serialization shape is preserved (algorithm + reason in JSON)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
